DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CARLOS VILLANUEVA'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CASE FOR FAILURE TO OBEY COURT ORDER; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS: 1) PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, GREG HYNES, MUST SIGN AND FILE NOTICE OF COUNSEL/SUBSTITUTION OF COUNSEL BY TUEDAY, MAY 13, 2014 AT THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL RESULT IN AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SCHEDULED FOR JUNE 02, 2014 AT 9:00 AM. MR. GREG HYNES IS ORDERED PRESENT. THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE MUST BE SERVED BY DEFENDANT BY PERSONAL SERVICE. 2) PLAINTIFF HAS 60 DAYS FROM MAY 08, 2014 TO PAY SANCTIONS AND FILING FEES OF $520.00 ORDERED BY THE COURT ON JANUARY 15, 2014.(SANCTION $460 PLUS $60 FILING FEES) 3) PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER AND TO SEND A COPY TO PLAINTIFF AT HIS GIVEN ADDRESS. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; ATTEND DEPOSITION FILED BY DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, CARLOS JESUS HEARING SET FOR JAN-15-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, CARLOS JESUS

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT CARLOS VILLANUEVA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS; ATTEND DEPOSITION IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - SET ONE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS - SET ONE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PROVIDED THE COURT WITH ATTACHMENT "A" TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS THAT CONTAINS THE ACTUAL DOCUMENT REQUESTS THEMSELVES. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO ATTEND HIS DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. WITHIN 21 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER ON PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES - SET ONE; PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT TO A DEPOSITION LASTING NO MORE THAN 7 HOURS AT A LOCATION CHOSEN BY DEFENDANT IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, AND SHALL PRODUCE AT HIS DEPOSITION THE DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN EXHIBIT "A" TO THE NOTICE OF DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY SERVED ON SEPTEMBER 9, 2013. PLAINTIFF SHALL, WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER PAY DEFENDANT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $460 TO COMPENSATE DEFENDANT FOR THE TWO HOURS OF ATTORNEY TIME REQUIRED TO PREPARE THE MOTION TO COMPEL AND THE $60 FILING FEE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM ERNEST A. HALPERIN, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Defendant Carlos Villanueva'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Case For Failure To Obey Court Order; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Frank Wallace, (415-756-6624) Plaintiff and opposing party in Pro Per.
Stephanie Morgan of Mecy Housing (415-254-5419) assisting the Plaintiff.
Marilou Bustonera, Esq of Gilsleider & McMahon (925-446-3113) Carlos Jesus Villanueva, for Defendant and moving party through Court Call.

The matter is first called at 9:12 AM. Plaintiff was not present. The matter was recalled at 10:15 am. Plaintiff checked in at the wrong Department and was waiting outside of D302. Hearing is held. Plaintiff informs the Court of his new address of 1075 Leconte Avenue, Apt. 423, San Francisco, CA 94124 and that he has new counsel, Greg Hynes. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, rules as follows: Defendant Carlos Villanueva'S Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Case For Failure To Obey Court Order; Request For Sanctions:
1) Plaintiff's counsel, Greg Hynes, must sign and file notice of counsel/substitution of counsel by Tueday, May 13, 2014 at the close of business day. Failure to do so will result in an Order to Show Cause hearing scheduled for June 02, 2014 at 9:00 am. Mr. Greg Hynes is ordered present. The Order to Show Cause must be served by Defendant by personal service.
2) Plaintiff has 60 days from May 08, 2014 to pay sanctions and filing fees of $520.00 ordered by the Court on January 15, 2014.(sanction $460 plus $60 filing fees)
3) Prevailing party to prepare order and to send a copy to Plaintiff at his given address.
Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents; Attend Deposition
Off Calendar Jan-15-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Marilou R. Bustonera of Gilsleider & McMahon (925-446-3113) CourtCall appearance for defendant Carlos J. Villanueva moving party. No other appearance.

Discussion, the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CARLOS VILLANUEVA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents; Attend Deposition is GRANTED IN PART. Defendant's motion to compel Plaintiff to provide responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories - Set One is GRANTED. Defendant's motion to compel Plaintiff to provide response to Defendant's Requests for Production of Documents - Set One is DENIED. Defendant has not provided the Court with Attachment "A" to Defendant's Request for Production of Documents that contains the actual document requests themselves. Defendant's motion to compel Plaintiff to attend his deposition is GRANTED. Within 21 days of service of notice of entry of order on Plaintiff, Plaintiff shall provide verified responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories - Set One; Plaintiff shall submit to a deposition lasting no more than 7 hours at a location chosen by Defendant in the City and County of San Francisco within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, and shall produce at his deposition the documents identified in Exhibit "A" to the Notice of Deposition of Plaintiff previously served on September 9, 2013. Plaintiff shall, within 30 days of notice of entry of this order pay Defendant sanctions in the amount of $460 to compensate Defendant for the two hours of attorney time required to prepare the motion to compel and the $60 filing fee. Defendant to prepare order. Judge Pro Tem Ernest A. Halperin, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)
